'''Vago Gejalli Thokka''' was a [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] [[Crime lord/Legends|crime lord]]. Although born into the [[Gejalli]] [[Kajidic/Legends|kajidic]], Vago was adopted into the [[Anjiliac]] clan by [[Popara Anjiliac Diresto|Popara]] with the eradication of her blood-clan's holdings.

Never fully trusted by the Anjiliac Hutts, Vago was used as an intermediary because of her ability to speak [[Galactic Basic Standard/Legends|Basic]]. After the [[Death/Legends|death]] of her adoptive parent, Vago coordinated the eradication of Popara's [[Assassin/Legends|assassin]], [[Mika Anjiliac Chiera|Mika]] and became the newest [[Kajidii/Legends|Kajidii]] of the Anjiliac clan.

==Appearances==
